_crystal_costs: Level 2-3: Blue only | Level 4-5: Blue+Red | Level 6-7: Red+Yellow | Level 8-9: Yellow only
_unlock_note: BaseDropPool = available from the first break. Unlocks = added to the pool by consuming a craftable item from the bench.
_gem_cave_note: Gem Cave uses low gem weights to convey rarity — each drop is a lucky find within the normal 100/300 ticks.

Gem Cave._note: Gem weights are intentionally low — each gem drop is a rare event within the 100/300 tick window.
